source: BLS Consumer Expenditure Survey published Honolulu MSA tables (bootstrap; pending PUMD microdata refresh)
note: Bootstrap values derived from BLS CES 2022-23 published Honolulu MSA aggregates (Table 3204 metro-area patterns), inflated to 2024-12 via Honolulu food CPI (CUURS49ASAF11). Honolulu figures are direct; neighbor-island values applied the receipt-derived basket gradient (county_comparison.csv totals). State is a population-weighted mean of the four county estimates. The preferred refresh path is `python3 pipelines/grocery/scripts/refresh_ce_pumd.py`, which downloads BLS PUMD interview-survey microdata and computes FINLWT21-weighted means per family-size stratum across a 5-year pool. As of this bootstrap, the BLS PUMD download is blocked from this environment by Akamai access controls; running the refresh script from an unblocked network (e.g. a residential connection) will overwrite this file with microdata-derived values plus 95% CIs and an n_households count.
